---
title: "Chocolate Sales"
page-layout: full
image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/65882/chocolate-dark-coffee-confiserie-65882.jpeg"
---


![](https://images.pexels.com/photos/65882/chocolate-dark-coffee-confiserie-65882.jpeg){width=85%}

*[Pixabay](https://www.pexels.com/@pixabay) - pexels*


## Overview
Analysis of chocolate sales over the world

## Data
Data came from [kaggle dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/saidaminsaidaxmadov/chocolate-sales)


## Method

## Tools
